chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-472 of 2024 Safia Bano & others Versus Anwar Ali & another Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on office objection. 2. For orders on Misc. no.2314/24 3. For orders on Misc. No.2315/24 4. For hearing of main case Dated: 17.05.2024 None present. -.-.- Since last three dates counsel is either not appearing or assisting the Court. He made a request for time on 29.01.2024 followed by request for adjournment on 06.03.2024 and then his absence on 18.04.2024. Today position is same as neither petitioners nor their counsel is in attendance. There is no intimation either. Petition as such is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed applications. Judge Judge
